scripts.dev: for p in $(lsof -tiTCP:3002 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 "$p" 2>/dev/null || true; done; node -e "console.log('[beeper-crm] Starting dev on http://localhost:3002 (port 3002 cleared if stale; first compile can take a while)')" && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true next dev -p 3002 --hostname localhost --webpack
scripts.dev:turbo: node -e "console.log('[beeper-crm] Turbopack dev on http://localhost:3002')" && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true next dev -p 3002 --hostname localhost --turbopack
scripts.dev:network: node -e "console.log('[beeper-crm] Starting dev on 0.0.0.0:3002')" && WATCHPACK_POLLING=true CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true next dev -p 3002 --hostname 0.0.0.0 --webpack
